page_metadata.biotools__summary: Pipeline for calling metagenomic single nucleotide variants (SNVs). It was designed to scale well with the exponentially increasing amount of metagenomic datasets and is capable of handling large multi-species references.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Pipeline for calling metagenomic single nucleotide variants (SNVs). It was designed to scale well with the exponentially increasing amount of metagenomic datasets and is capable of handling large multi-species references.
